name: JobFlow - AI Job Tracker
description: Extract job postings with AI and track your applications locally.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* https://api.perplexity.ai https://boards-api.greenhouse.io https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.jobflow.app
